mapper.select: SELECT rt.*, ct.template_name as check_template_name, ct.template_code as check_template_code FROM rating_templates rt LEFT JOIN check_templates ct ON rt.check_template_id = ct.id AND ct.deleted = 0 WHERE rt.deleted = 0 AND rt.id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM rating_templates WHERE deleted = 0 AND check_template_id = #{checkTemplateId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM rating_templates WHERE deleted = 0 AND template_code = #{templateCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM rating_templates WHERE deleted = 0 AND is_default = 1 AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE rating_templates SET is_default = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE deleted = 0 AND id = #{id}
UPDATE rating_templates SET is_default = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE deleted = 0 AND is_default = 1
